name: lock file merge logic uses last-writer-wins for the rubric section with conflict surfaced
command: printf '{"rubric":{"hash":"abc"}}\n' > a.json && printf '{"rubric":{"hash":"xyz"}}\n' > b.json && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/merge-lock.sh" --a a.json --b b.json --out merged.json --emit conflicts 2>out.txt && grep -q '"hash":"xyz"' merged.json && grep -q 'conflict=rubric.hash' out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
